case_title: WALTER OHLEMUTZ VS. JOHN MIHAI et al

docket_entries.description: BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OHLEMUTZ, WALTER AS TRUSTEE OF THE WALTER OHLEMUTZ AND GISELA FRANKEN TRUST DATED MAY 18, 2000 AS TO DEFENDANT MIHAI, JOHN ALL PERSONS CLAIMING, BY AND THROUGH, OR UNDER SUCH PERSON, ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-2002
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-01-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
